project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game app with Zustand state management
build_system: Vite with tsc -b for type checking (pre-existing TS errors in BattlePanel.tsx do not block build)
verification_instructions: Run npm run build and verify exit code 0 and dist/ directory is populated
environment_constraints: No test runner available. Verification is build-only.
key_patterns: All CSS is in src/App.css (minified single-line styles). Icons are SVG components in src/components/Icons.tsx. Translation keys are in i18n files. Season cards modal and player cards modal share the same CSS classes (season-card-*). Legend tooltip uses .legend-button-wrapper/.legend-tooltip/.legend-tooltip-row classes already defined in CSS.
directory_structure: src/components/ has all React components. src/App.css has all styles. src/types/ has type definitions. src/i18n/ has translations.
